mapper.select: SELECT b.icategory categoryId, a.iboard boardId, c.iuser userId, b.name boardCategoryName, a.title, a.contents, c.unm writer, a.created_at createdAt, a.updated_at updatedAt FROM board a INNER JOIN board_category b ON a.icategory = b.icategory INNER JOIN user c ON a.iuser = c.iuser WHERE a.iboard = #{boardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board SET icategory = #{categoryId}, isubject = ${subjectId}, title = #{title}, contents = #{contents}, iuser = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT icategory categoryId, name boardName FROM board_category WHERE icategory = #{categoryId}
SELECT isubject subjectId, NAME subjectName FROM board_subject WHERE icategory = #{categoryId}
